author: audit-agent

patch.value:
Findings:
1. SECURITY: Scrubbed 192.168.x.x from 16 git-tracked pm item/history files
2. TESTS: 81 files, 1087 tests pass; 67/67 dogfood commands verified
3. SEARCH: Semantic/keyword/hybrid all working; 643 indexed items, 0 stale
4. CODE QUALITY: command-aware.ts unused but valuable; undici+c8 unused deps; normalizeTimeoutMs duplicated in providers.ts and vector-stores.ts
5. TELEMETRY: Stack healthy (API healthz OK, Grafana 302); analysis scripts in scripts/prod/telemetry/
6. SENTRY: 8 issues all PmCliError (user input); scrubbing working; 20% trace rate appropriate
7. CALENDAR: All views/formats/filters/recurrence working
8. SDK: All 9 capability types exported; starter extension comprehensive
9. OUTPUT: TOON 30-40% smaller than JSON; errors include structured next_steps/examples
Chore: 2026-05-02 Phase 3 Audit - IP scrub, dogfood, analysis tooling

Comprehensive audit session Phase 3: scrubbed 16 files with private IP leaks, ran full dogfood test matrix (67/67 commands), created telemetry analysis tooling, verified Sentry/telemetry stack health, documented findings
All private IPs scrubbed from git-tracked files; dogfood tests pass; telemetry stack healthy; analysis scripts created; findings documented

message: Create audit chore for Phase 3 session findings

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Audit evidence: 81 test files pass (1087 tests); dogfood matrix 67/67 in /tmp/pm-dogfood-audit-20260502-091551; search semantic/keyword/hybrid all working; Sentry has 8 PmCliError issues (all user input errors, no bugs); telemetry API healthy; TOON output 30-40% smaller than JSON.

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Private IPs in pm items were from prior audit evidence that referenced SSH commands. Future evidence must use domain names only. The check-secrets.mjs catches these patterns. The command-aware.ts module is unused but contains valuable agent UX code that should be integrated.

patch.value: Phase 3 audit complete: all 10 phases executed, findings documented, IP scrub applied, analysis tooling created
All audit phases completed: security scrub (16 files), dogfood (67/67), search verified, SDK reviewed, calendar tested, output optimized, code quality scanned, telemetry analyzed, findings documented
Full audit with zero regressions found
All systems functional, 8 Sentry issues are user errors not bugs, 3 unused deps/files identified for cleanup
